retry_reason: The refcount decrement always succeeds; there is no failure case to retry.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper for cachefiles_kiocb objects. It decrements the reference count and, on reaching zero, releases the associated cachefiles object, the file reference, and frees the kiocb itself. After calling this function, the caller must not access the kiocb pointer, as it may be freed. No return value to check; the operation is unconditional.
